description: The file 'linkage_profile.FCStd' is open in FreeCAD. Fully constrain the 'LinkageSlot' sketch by applying a horizontal distance constraint of 120 mm between the centers of the two arcs and a radius constraint of 25 mm to one of the arcs. Ensure the sketch has zero degrees of freedom and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/linkage_profile.FCStd.
